presenting a scar—i.e. a region where the active contractility is impaired. For the given contractility field we solve the force

mimicking the output of imaging techniques. By an optimization technique, we solve the inverse problem to reconstruct the

features of inverse problems in finite elasticity. Accordingly, we assume the isotropic part to behave as a
